title: Baill
subtitle: Aimsigh comharsana, scileanna, leasanna comhroinnte, agus baill iontaofa an bhainc ama.
filtersIntro: Cuardaigh de réir ainm, téacs próifíle, nó sonraí ball áitiúil.

connections.title: Ceangail
connections.subtitle: Bainistigh do naisc bhall, iarratais ar feitheamh, agus bealaí teachtaireachtaí díreacha.

accepted.title: Níl ceangail ann fós
accepted.description: Aimsigh baill agus seol iarratais ar cheangail.

pending_received.title: Ní dhéanfar aon iarratas ar athbhreithniú
pending_received.description: Ní bheidh iarratais ar cheangail isteach le feiceáil anseo.

pending_sent.title: Níl iarratais seolta ann
pending_sent.description: Beidh iarratais ar cheangail a sheolann tú le feiceáil anseo go dtí go nglacfar leo.

connections.actionFailedDescription: Déan iarracht eile, le do thoil.

profile.ownProfileHint: Coinnigh do phróifíl úr ionas go mbeidh a fhios ag baill eile cad is féidir leat a thairiscint agus cad a bhfuil suim agat ann.
profile.noBio: Níor chuir an ball seo beathaisnéis leis fós.
profile.noBioOwn: Cuir beathaisnéis ghairid leis ionas go mbeidh a fhios ag baill eile conas teagmháil a dhéanamh leat.
profile.signInRequired: Sínigh isteach chun do phróifíl a fheiceáil.
profile.federatedProfileHint: Roinntear an phróifíl seo ó {{community}} trí líonra an chónaidhm.
profile.externalFederatedMemberDescription: Tá an comhalta seo roinnte ag comhpháirtí seachtrach. Is féidir leat teachtaireacht chónaidhme a thosú, ach fanann an phróifíl iomlán ar an gcóras comhpháirtíochta.
profile.externalFederatedTrustHint: Taispeánfar léirmheasanna arna soláthar ag comhpháirtí anseo nuair a roinneann comhpháirtí an chónaidhm iad.
profile.transferDescriptionPlaceholder: Cad as a bhfuil na creidmheasanna seo?
profile.transferAmountRequired: Cuir isteach méid iomlán idir 1 agus 100.
profile.transferDescriptionRequired: Cuir cur síos leis ar an aistriú seo.
profile.transferFailedMessage: Seiceáil le do thoil go bhfuil malartuithe cónaidhm cumasaithe agus bain triail eile as.
profile.loadError: Níorbh fhéidir próifíl na mball a lódáil. Bain triail eile as le do thoil.
profile.disconnectMessage: Is féidir leat ceangal arís níos déanaí.
profile.connectionError: Níorbh fhéidir an ceangal a nuashonrú
profile.trustStatusHint: Verification labels are loaded from the member verification system.
profile.federatedTrustHint: Federated trust details are shared by the partner community when available.
profile.appreciationsHint: Read public thank-you notes shared with {{name}}.
profile.collectionsOwnHint: Organise the posts, listings, events, groups, jobs, resources, and marketplace items you save.

collections.mySubtitle: Organise saved items into reusable collections.
collections.publicSubtitle: Browse collections this member has shared publicly.
collections.name: Name
collections.emptyMineSubtitle: Create a collection to organise saved items.
collections.emptyPublicSubtitle: Public collections will appear here when this member shares them.
collections.emptyItemsSubtitle: Saved items will appear here after this collection is used.
collections.removeFailed: Could not remove that saved item.

appreciations.wallSubtitle: Public thank-you notes and reactions from the community.
appreciations.emptySubtitle: Thank-you notes will appear here when members share them publicly.
appreciations.signInMessage: Reactions are available after you sign in.

empty.title: Gan baill aimsithe
empty.subtitle: Bain triail as do chuardach nó scagairí a athrú
